hook.text: UNITED CHASE BATURINA AFTER STUNNING WORLD CUP STRIKE

beats.text: THE COMO WINGER CURLED PAST PICKFORD TO STUN ENGLAND
COMO HAVE ALREADY REJECTED A £43M BID FOR BATURINA
UNITED FACE COMPETITION FROM BUNDESLIGA GIANTS BAYERN MUNICH

caption: The World Cup is producing United's next target 🔴 Martin Baturina curled one past Jordan Pickford to stun England for Croatia — and now Manchester United want him. The 23-year-old Como midfielder is one of the most exciting attackers at the tournament, but Como have already rejected a £43m bid with Bayern Munich also in the race. Would you take Baturina to Old Trafford? 👇 RUMOUR — per TeamTalk / Football365. #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #transfernews #transferwindow
